name: Homelab Dashboard
subtitle: Monitor and manage your homelab
description: A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem. Built with Swift 6 and SwiftUI, featuring the Liquid Glass design system.

apps.name: Homelab
apps.subtitle: Your homelab, in your pocket.
apps.localizedDescription:
A premium, fully native iOS app for monitoring and managing your personal Homelab ecosystem.

Integrated services:
• Portainer — Monitor Docker containers, CPU/Memory usage, Start/Stop/Restart
• Pi-hole — Real-time query stats, blocked domains, toggle ad-blocking
• Beszel — System monitor with CPU, Memory, Disk usage across nodes
• Gitea — Browse repos, contribution heatmaps, syntax-highlighted code
• Nginx Proxy Manager — Proxy hosts, redirections, SSL certificates
• Tailscale — VPN connectivity status and quick launch
• AdGuard Home — DNS query stats, filters, blocked services, rewrites
• Healthcheck — Monitor uptime, response times, notifications
• Patchmon — Track software updates and patches across your infrastructure
• Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage and playback stats
• Bookmarks — Save and organize your homelab links

Features:
• Multi-instance support for all services
• Cyberpunk visual mode for service cards
• Multilingual: English, Italian, French, Spanish, German
• Liquid Glass UI design
• Face ID / biometric unlock

versions.localizedDescription:
What's New in v0.7.0:

- New Service: Patchmon — Track software updates and patches
- New Service: Jellystat — Monitor Jellyfin media server usage
- Cyberpunk mode — unique visual theme for service cards
- Android UI redesign for multiple services
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

## What's New in v0.6.0

### New Service: Healthcheck
- Monitor uptime and health of your services
- View check statuses, response times, and notifications
- Create/edit checks with full configuration

### Improvements
- Redesigned README with table of contents and collapsible screenshot galleries
- Fixed SWIFT_COMPILATION_MODE to persist across project regeneration
- Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
- Various bug fixes and stability improvements

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JohnnWi/homelab-project/compare/v0.5.0...v0.6.0

What's New in v0.5.0:

• New Service: AdGuard Home DNS
• Dashboard with real-time query statistics
• Query log, filters, blocked services, rewrites, user rules
• New ServiceIcon component
• Updated translations (EN, IT, DE, ES, FR)
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

What's New in v0.4.0:

• Redesigned dashboard UI for all services
• New Beszel containers view and system detail
• Line graph visualizations
• Debug logging and improved error handling
• Multi-language support updates
• Various bug fixes and stability improvements

privacy.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Homelab uses Face ID to quickly unlock the app.
privacy.NSLocalNetworkUsageDescription: Homelab needs to access your local network to communicate with your self-hosted services.

news.title: v0.7.0 — Patchmon, Jellystat & Cyberpunk Mode
news.caption: New Patchmon and Jellystat services, plus a cyberpunk visual theme for service cards.

news.title: v0.6.0 — Healthcheck Service
news.caption: New Healthcheck service to monitor uptime, response times, and notifications for all your services.

news.title: v0.5.0 — AdGuard DNS
news.caption: New AdGuard Home DNS service with dashboard, query log, filters, and more.

news.title: v0.4.0 — New UI for All Services
news.caption: Redesigned dashboard UI, new Beszel features, and improved error handling.
